## Summary

- What problem does this PR solve?
- Why is this approach chosen?

## Changes

- Key change 1
- Key change 2
- Key change 3

## Type of change

- [ ] feat (new feature)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] docs
- [ ] test
- [ ] chore

## Verification

- [ ] `bun run quality`
- [ ] Manual testing completed (if applicable)

## Test notes

- Describe commands run and outcomes
- Include screenshots/logs for UI changes when useful

## Risk and impact

- Areas affected:
- Backward compatibility impact:
- Rollback approach (if needed):

## Linked issues

- Closes #
- Related #

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commit style
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior/workflow changed
- [ ] No secrets or credentials added
- [ ] CodeRabbit comments addressed (or acknowledged)
